title: Video question example survey
description: A minimal survey demonstrating the `video` custom question type introduced in plugin v1.4.8. Page 1 plays a sub-segment with both timestamps set and `isRequired: true` (the participant must watch to `endTimestamp` before advancing — the alert message is taken from the per-question `requiredWatchMessage` when set, otherwise from the built-in translation table indexed by `survey.locale`). Page 2 plays the entire video without segment enforcement and demonstrates `autoStart: true` — because page 2 is reached via the Next button (a user gesture), the browser allows autoplay-with-sound. The URL goes into 'videoUrl'; layout is controlled by 'videoFit' / 'videoHeight' / 'videoWidth'.

elements.name: intro_html
elements.html: Please watch the highlighted excerpt of the video below. Playback is restricted to the configured range. You can pause, resume, and seek freely inside that range; replays restart from the beginning of the segment.

elements.name: intro_excerpt
elements.title: Watch the introduction excerpt (12s – 47s)
elements.requiredWatchMessage: Please watch the entire excerpt before continuing.

elements.name: full_html
elements.html: This time the entire file plays — there is no segment enforcement, since neither startTimestamp nor endTimestamp is set. autoStart is true, so the video begins playing as soon as you reach this page (the Next-button click counts as the user gesture browsers require for autoplay-with-sound).

elements.name: watched_completely
elements.title: Did you watch both videos to the end?
